arts.sum: Coventry continue to curse the absence of the injured Haji Wright after attempting 17 shots without finding the back of the net in a 2-0 defeat to West Brom in midweek. The Sky Blues have won just o...

arts.ttl: Coventry vs Hull predictions: Tigers to trouble Sky Blues
arts.sum: Coventry take on Hull at the CBS Arena in the Championship on Saturday and Dan Childs expects the visitors to take at least a share of the points.

arts.ttl: Frank Lampard lauds 'important' attacking duo after Coventry City defeat to West Brom
arts.sum: Coventry City boss Frank Lampard has spoken his praise for two of the Sky Blues' forward talents after they were defeated by West Bromwich Albion on Wednesday evening. Belgian striker Bassette came in for praise from his new boss Lampard after the game which, on another day, they could easily have won.
